payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board Meeting agenda and action items for October 29, 2025

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: MTA Board met on October 29, 2025 at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Boardroom, New York, NY
Decreases total funding to $55.432 billion; CPRB portion $52.182 billion

payload.claim_text: MTA Board calls on the City of New York to expand eligibility for the Fair Fares program to at least 200% of the Federal Poverty Level
payload.description: Resolution urging City to expand Fair Fares NYC eligibility to 200% FPL and invest in community outreach

tool_args.label: 650k additional New Yorkers would qualify for Fair Fares

payload.raw_value_text: an estimated 650,000 additional New Yorkers
payload.context: Expanding Fair Fares NYC eligibility to 200% of the Federal Poverty Level

payload.raw_value_text: $55.432 billion
payload.context: MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment #5 total program funding

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access $1.644B federal funding recognized

payload.raw_value_text: $1.644 billion in previously announced and anticipated federal funding for the Penn Station Access (PSA) project

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: City of NY $45M increase for subway and MTA Bus projects

payload.raw_value_text: City of New York: Increase of $45 million for subway system and MTA Bus Company projects
NYCT Program: $33.945 billion

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 2 launched

payload.claim_text: Phase 2 of the Queens Bus Network Redesign launched a couple of weeks ago and is showing increased speeds, especially on the new Rush routes -- 7% faster than their predecessors.

payload.raw_value_text: 7% faster than their predecessors
payload.context: Phase 2 of Queens Bus Network Redesign

warnings: metric_claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids on metric payloads refer to route entities and should become explicit relations when supported. Suggested relation: route has_metric metric_claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.raw_value_text: Long Island Rail Road broke the 300,000 mark twice in the last week, boosted by the 20,000 golf fans heading to the Ryder Cup

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

tool_args.label: Subways had 4 million riders across full week

payload.raw_value_text: Subways had two weeks of 4 million riders throughout the week

tool_args.label: Paratransit record 47,000 trips in a single day

payload.raw_value_text: busiest single day ever -- September 10 -- with 47,000 paratransit trips

tool_args.label: State of NY $58M increase for Interboro and SAS West

payload.raw_value_text: State of New York: Net increase of $58 million, reflecting additional support for the Interboro Express and Second Avenue Subway West Expansion projects

payload.claim_text: new Metro-North super express service that is going to start running soon between the City and Poughkeepsie
payload.description: Sub-90-minute trips months ahead of planned schedule

payload.raw_value_text: Subway on-time performance (OTP) over the last three months was on par with the May record of 85% overall

payload.raw_value_text: The commuter railroads are performing at a really high level as always -- 97% on average -- well above their goals

tool_args.label: Weigh-in-Motion Program approved for RFK Bridge

payload.claim_text: Board authorizes TBTA to design and implement a Weigh-in-Motion (WIM) demonstration program on the Robert F. Kennedy (RFK) Bridge to identify overweight trucks

tool_args.label: Work Zone Speed Enforcement Program authorized

payload.claim_text: Board authorizes TBTA to design and implement a Work Zone Speed Enforcement (WZSE) demonstration program on up to nine Authority facilities
payload.description: Program will use radar and automated cameras to identify vehicles driving 10+ mph above posted speed limit in active work zones

tool_args.label: CRZ Bond Resolution for $15B transit funding

payload.claim_text: TBTA Board authorized submission of the Congestion Relief Zone Toll Revenue Obligation Resolution to the CPRB, to enable issuance of notes and bonds secured by CRZ revenues to fund $15 billion for transit and commuter rail capital projects
payload.description: CRZ Tolling Program went into effect January 5, 2025. Over $4 billion committed to date including SAS Phase 2, LIRR/MNR rolling stock, ADA upgrades

payload.raw_value_text: $15 billion for transit and commuter rail capital projects
